events.name: Sanborn Fire Insurance Survey (Anchorage, Sheet 1)
events.description: Sanborn Map Company fire-insurance survey of downtown Anchorage, sheet 1, published September 1916; documents blocks 28, 29, 30, 38, 39, 40 (3rd–5th Ave, G–K St).

events.name: Sanborn Fire Insurance Survey (Anchorage, Sheet 3)
events.description: Sanborn Map Company fire-insurance survey of downtown Anchorage, sheet 3, published September 1922; documents blocks 28, 29, 39, 40, 53, 54 (3rd–6th Ave, G–I St). Reconciled against the 1916 baseline for blocks 28, 29, 40.

asr_ftr_axx_28_01_name.notes: Business name legible on 1916 Sanborn sheet 1, block 28.

asr_st_axx_28_01_a_rep.notes: Footprint manually traced from 1916 Sanborn sheet 1, block 28; height_m inferred from story count (2.0) per GA1 rule (3.5 m/story, 1.5 story -> 5 m).

asr_ftr_axx_29_17_name1_1922.notes: Business name legible on 1922 Sanborn sheet 3 (superseding 1916 tenant).

asr_st_axx_28_03_a_b_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 28: McCain's Studio site now a wood-frame dwelling (D), footprint widened east; renovated/converted, not persisted verbatim.

asr_st_axx_28_04_a_b_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 28: Lodgings building retains 2 stories but gains an attached 1-story 'Rms' wing to the south (720 1/2); footprint extended.

asr_st_axx_29_06_a_b_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 29: Parson's Hotel rebuilt/expanded to 3 stories, absorbing the adjacent Knik Hardware Co. lot; footprint enlarged east and deepened south. No color change observed on the sheet, so material is carried forward as wood_frame rather than inferred as concrete.

asr_st_axx_40_22_a_b_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 40: Plumbing shop renamed 'Plumbg & Sheet Metal Shop', gains an attached tent-roofed wing ('Tent Ho.') to the east; footprint extended.

asr_st_axx_28_40_a_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 28: small dwelling occupying the cleared Riverside Hotel/Garage lot at the block's east end; no legible name on the sheet.

asr_ftr_axx_29_20_name1.notes: Business name legible on 1922 Sanborn sheet 3; building absent from 1916 sheet 1.

asr_st_axx_29_20_a_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 29: 'Annex' addition attached behind the rebuilt Parson's Hotel, labeled separately on the sheet.

asr_ftr_axx_29_21_name1.notes: Business name legible on 1922 Sanborn sheet 3; building absent from 1916 sheet 1.

asr_st_axx_29_21_a_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 29: 'Needle Work' shop on the former U.G. Crocker Furniture lot.

asr_ftr_axx_40_29_name1.notes: Business name legible on 1922 Sanborn sheet 3; building absent from 1916 sheet 1.

asr_ftr_axx_40_29_name2.notes: Business name legible on 1922 Sanborn sheet 3; building absent from 1916 sheet 1.

asr_st_axx_40_29_a_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 40: large 'Ford Garage / Auto Accessories' building (3 stories, apartments on 2nd & 3rd) replacing several small 1916 shops (cobbler, offices, tailors).

asr_st_axx_40_30_a_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 40: 'Gro.' (grocery) building, generic abbreviation only, no proper name legible.

asr_st_axx_40_31_a_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 40: small 'Hardw.' unit, generic abbreviation only, no proper name legible.

asr_ftr_axx_40_32_name1.notes: Business name legible on 1922 Sanborn sheet 3; building absent from 1916 sheet 1.

asr_st_axx_40_32_a_rep.notes: 1922 sheet 3 block 40: 'Heavy Hardw. W.Ho.' warehouse building replacing the 1916 blacksmith shop; no story number legible on the sheet, so stories carried as 1 (fail loud, not inferred).
